title: Bartoline Creocote Oil-Based Timber Treatment for Garden Sheds, Fences & Trellis 4 l – Wood Protection & Weatherproofing (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
SUPERIOR WEATHER PROTECTION: Bartoline Creocote offers excellent water repellency and protection against weather damage for outdoor timber structures like sheds, fences, and trellis work.
LONG-LASTING DURABILITY: The oil-based formula enhances grain definition and maintains wood’s strength, ensuring long-lasting protection against the elements.
VERSATILE APPLICATION METHODS: Apply with brush, spray, or dip for optimal coverage, ideal for both small and large timber projects.
RE-TREATS EASILY: Ideal for re-treatment of timbers previously treated with Creosote or similar products. For best results, strip sealed or painted wood back to bare timber.
COST-EFFECTIVE COVERAGE: One litre covers 6-8 square meters, providing efficient and economical protection for all your outdoor wooden projects.
SHADE AND END FINISH: The shade may vary from batch to batch , and the final shade is dependent upon the timber being treated. It is recommended to test patches before application.
description: Directions Prepare surface, apply by brushing, 1 Litre covers 6-8 square meters.
